values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

I'm not actually sure if this is going to fix the crash or not - I'll dig on that a bit more - but it's a needed fix in exactly the same area, so I've pushed it with some testing...

parents.subject: LU-17367 utils: improved hostname and IPv6 NID support

commit.subject: LU-18006 osc: rework sdio locking
commit.message:
LU-18006 osc: rework sdio locking

We cannot hold a spinlock across a call to kthread_create,
so we have to rearrange the locking for this, moving the
locking inside the data copy function.  This handles the
multithreading in a slightly different spot.
